name: task-ESE-0010
title: Context-free demo validation CLI command
description:
Add `npm run agile -- ticket validate-demo <name>` command. This command:

1. Reads demo-expected.json, demo-readme.json, and all artifact files for the ticket's sprint
2. Generates a self-contained prompt with ONLY the demo file contents inlined (no source code, no implementation context)
3. Outputs the prompt so the calling agent can spawn a subagent with exactly that text
4. The subagent writes demo-actual.json based only on the inlined artifacts

The `demoValidated` gate should check that demo-actual.json contains a `validatedBy` field that does NOT match the current `CLAUDE_SESSION_ID`, ensuring the main agent cannot validate its own demo.

Also enforce human-only gates: `ticket accept` and `done` transitions must be blocked when `CLAUDE_SESSION_ID` is set (caller is an agent, not a human).
acceptanceCriteria:
- `npm run agile -- ticket validate-demo <name>` generates a self-contained prompt with demo artifacts inlined
- The prompt contains NO source code or implementation context — only demo-expected.json, demo-readme.json, and artifact file contents
- The generated prompt instructs the subagent to write demo-actual.json with the standard structure plus a `validatedBy` field
- `demoValidated` gate checks `validatedBy` !== current CLAUDE_SESSION_ID
- `ticket accept` blocked when CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is set
- `done` transition blocked when CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is set
- CLAUDE.md updated with instructions to use validate-demo command
demoDeliverable: Terminal output showing: (1) validate-demo command generating a prompt from demo artifacts, (2) ticket accept blocked by agent, (3) done transition blocked by agent
testingScenarios:
- Run validate-demo on a ticket with demo artifacts, verify prompt contains only demo content
- Verify prompt does NOT contain source code paths or implementation details
- Verify demoValidated gate rejects demo-actual.json where validatedBy matches CLAUDE_SESSION_ID
- Verify ticket accept fails when CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is set
- Verify done transition fails when CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is set
- Verify ticket accept succeeds when CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is not set
testingNotes: Unit tests for the validate-demo prompt generation. Integration test for the human-only gates.
